hooks.command:
if echo "$CC_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then echo '
⚠️  MANDATORY: Run all 3 code review channels before proceeding to the next task:

  1. Codex CLI:
     Auth: codex login status 2>/dev/null
     Run:  codex exec --skip-git-repo-check -s read-only --ephemeral "REVIEW_PROMPT" 2>/dev/null

  2. Gemini CLI:
     Auth: NO_BROWSER=true gemini -p "respond with ok" -o json 2>&1
     Run:  NO_BROWSER=true gemini -p "REVIEW_PROMPT" --output-format json --approval-mode yolo 2>/dev/null

  3. Superpowers code-reviewer:
     Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent with BASE_SHA and HEAD_SHA

If auth fails: tell user to run ! codex login or ! gemini -p "hello"
Fix all P0/P1/P2 findings before moving on. Do NOT skip any channel.
Full instructions: scaffold run review-pr'; fi
